reply:
Main aapko Delhi mein bypass surgery ke liye hospitals dhoondne mein madad karunga jo 3 lakh ke andar hain. Thodi der mein results dikhata hoon.

📍 **Clinical Pathway:** 12 steps (Surgery (On-Pump), Discharge + Follow-Up, Follow-Up, ICU Care, Robotic Surgery (TECAB), ICU + Discharge, ICU + Ward, Ward + Discharge, Pre-Op + Patient Selection, Pre-Op Assessment, OPCAB Surgery)

⚠️ _Yeh ek advisory hai. Diagnosis ke liye doctor se zaroor milein. Kisi bhi emergency mein 112 ya nazdiki hospital jaayein._

❓ Which type of hospital do you want? (Advanced Multispecialty, Boutique Super-Specialty, Standard Secondary General, Small Day-Care Clinics, Tertiary Corporate)
msg: ❌ Advanced Multispecialty mein estimated cost ₹335,961–₹448,374 hai, jo aapke budget ₹300,000 se zyada hai. Neeche ke tier ka hospital ya Government hospital try karein.
